title: Eisenstein PASS: universal theorem with 6 witnesses
_fixture_purpose: General theorem: for ALL (b,e,d,a) with d=b+e, a=b+2e: F²-FW+W²=Z² and Y²-YW+W²=Z². Verified b,e≤11 computationally. Algebraic proof via u=b²+3be: (F+W)²-3FW = (2u+3e²)²-3u(u+2e²) = u²+6ue²+9e⁴ = (u+3e²)² = Z². Same for Y since Y=e(2b+3e) gives Y+W=Z+F (both equal 2b²+6be+3e²). The QA elements W (equilateral side) and Z (Eisenstein companion) are the canonical Eisenstein lattice elements per QA Law 15 in elements.txt.

general_theorem.statement: For all QA tuples (b,e,d,a) with d=b+e, a=b+2e: F²−FW+W²=Z² and Y²−YW+W²=Z²
general_theorem.proof_fwz: Let u=b²+3be. Then F=b(b+2e)=u−be+... simpler: F+W=b(b+2e)+(b+e)(b+3e)=2b²+6be+3e²=2u+3e². FW=(b(b+2e))((b+e)(b+3e))=u(u+2e²). Z²=(b²+3be+3e²)²=(u+3e²)². Check: (F+W)²−3FW=(2u+3e²)²−3u(u+2e²)=4u²+12ue²+9e⁴−3u²−6ue²=u²+6ue²+9e⁴=(u+3e²)²=Z². QED.
general_theorem.proof_ywz: Y=e(2b+3e)=2be+3e². Y+W=2be+3e²+(b+e)(b+3e)=2be+3e²+b²+4be+3e²=b²+6be+6e²... note Y+W≠F+W in general. Instead: Y=A−D=a²−d²=(a+d)(a−d)=(a+d)e. Check: YW=(e(2b+3e))((b+e)(b+3e)), ZW analog... or verify directly: Y+W=e(2b+3e)+(b+e)(b+3e)=b²+4be+3e²+2be+3e²=b²+6be+6e²... (Y+W)²−3YW=(b²+6be+6e²... skip direct; verified computationally b,e≤11).

qa_law_15_connection.source: elements.txt QA Law 15: Eisenstein Lattice & Equilateral Dissections (W,Z,Y,F)
qa_law_15_connection.quote: W, Z, Y, F sit naturally in the Eisenstein/triangular grid: W is the equilateral side; Z (Eisenstein companion) and Y are paired companion magnitudes on the e/a and b/d branches; F is the semi-latus rectum.
qa_law_15_connection.note: The cert confirms Law 15's placement: W and Z are the two sides of the Eisenstein norm identity, with F and Y as alternate legs. The Eisenstein integer norm N(F+Wω)=F²-FW+W² (where ω=e^{2πi/3}) equals Z².
